name: com.tk.analytics
description: Backend-agnostic analytics façade: log events, revenue and user properties through one API that fans out to any backend (Firebase, Adjust, …), with a consent gate and loss-free pre-init buffering — unifies the IAP/Ads monetization event stream.

samples.description: Editor-runnable demo on the built-in Console backend with ContextMenu triggers and the consent/buffer flow.
Firebase and Adjust backend adapters plus IAP/Ads monetization bridge reporters.
